name: Slightly Italian Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 large boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the inside of a crockpot with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Place drained mushrooms, drained artichoke hearts, and chopped green onions at the bottom of the crockpot.
3. Sprinkle vegetables with 1 tablespoon of quick-cooking tapioca and 1 envelope of low-sodium chicken broth (about 1 teaspoon if using granulated bouillon).
4. Arrange well-washed and dried boneless chicken breasts on top, ensuring all skin and fat are removed.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining sauce ingredients: fresh lemon juice, oregano, garlic powder, chicken broth, Italian salad dressing, white wine, and Worcestershire sauce.
6. Pour the sauce mixture over the chicken and vegetables.
7. Cover the crockpot and set it to cook on High for 5-6 hours or until the chicken is tender.
8. The tapioca will thicken the sauce during cooking, making its presence less noticeable in the final dish.
